blocks.text: Rory on the brink — Masters finale decides golf's greatest prize
NRK reports Hovland briljerte at Augusta — flirting with a course record, T19 his reward. McIlroy leads Scheffler by two with the back nine to play. Reitan had a tougher Sunday.
🎾 Mon 09:00 — Ruud opens at Barcelona Open, perfect clay tuning ahead of Roland Garros
Tuesday is all-or-nothing: Barcelona need a 2-0 miracle at Atlético's fortress, Liverpool the same at Anfield against PSG. Two impossible comebacks on the same night.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — second legs
items: Tue 21:00 — Atlético vs Barcelona (Barça 2-0 down, must score three)
Tue 21:00 — Liverpool vs PSG (Liverpool 2-0 down at Anfield)
Wed 21:00 — Sporting CP vs Arsenal (Arsenal 1-0 up, job to finish)
Wed 21:00 — Bayern vs Real Madrid (Bayern 2-1 ahead at Bernabéu)
